functional_requirements.description: User can create projects and organize tasks
User can assign tasks to team members with deadlines
User can track task progress with status updates
User can comment and collaborate on tasks
System provides dashboard with project overview and analytics
User can set priorities and labels for tasks
System sends notifications for task assignments and deadlines
Admin can manage teams and user permissions
User can attach files and documents to tasks
System supports task filtering sorting and search

non_functional_requirements.target: role-based access control for all operations
clean modular architecture for easy feature addition
